name: B. Riley Principal 250 Merger Corp. Class A common stock
summary: B. Riley Principal 250 Merger Corp. was a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was sponsored by an affiliate of B. Riley Financial, Inc. and no longer exists as it completed a business combination.
